name: skill-builder
description: Visual builder for creating, editing, testing, and exporting stateful automation skills.

interface.shortDescription: Create and edit stateful automation skills visually.
interface.longDescription: Skill Builder is a skill-hosted visual and conversational editor for stateful skill packages. After plugin installation, the agent harness reads the skill, launches the bundled local app, and can also apply natural-language edit requests directly to the skill filesystem. It supports importing existing skills, editing steps and helpers, live filesystem sync, and exporting Claude Code or Codex compatible skill packages.
defaultPrompt: Open Skill Builder for this skill package.
Create a new stateful skill workflow with Skill Builder.
Import this skill into Skill Builder and inspect its workflow.
